name: Deliver Food to Campers
Description:
Some poor souls camping on the mountain have run out of food! Could you be a dear and deliver a shipment to them for me? It should be a cakewalk for a strong adventurer like you! 1000 Eros upon completion.
- Vivian ♥

theScene: You continue your trek along the mountain, and you finally see a wooden cabin nestled on a rocky plateau a short distance away. Not a moment too late either, the bag of supplies Vivian gave you was starting to really weigh you down.
As you make your way to the cabin, you can hear some female voices angrily bickering on the other side of it.
Well maybe if {i}someone{/i} booked the right campsite, we wouldn't be on a mountain in {i}the middle of nowhere!{/i}
A second, much more relaxed and gentle voice speaks up, clearly trying to placate the anger of the first person.
Come on, this isn't all bad. It's overlooking the forest we wanted to camp at in the first place, so that's something, right?
Heather, a great view isn't going to stop us from starving to death!
A third, much calmer and collected voice with a hint of exasperation joins the conversation.
Well Jen, maybe you should have packed the food like you were supposed to.
We never agreed that was my job, Cathy! And besides, if we were in the forest {i}like we were supposed to be{/i}, we could have easily found food instead of bringing those disgusting potions!
I think you're both overreacting to this whole situation, someone should be bringing food to us soon.

As you finally round the corner of the cabin, the three women immediately stop their conversation and stare at you, giving you a moment to take in all three of their rather demonic looking appearances.

A pregnant silence fills the air as the three women focus their attention on you while you take in your surroundings. All three of the apparent succubi are sitting around an flickering flame filled fire pit in a few cozy looking chairs. The one named Heather was right, the view really is quite nice.

A pregnant silence fills the air as the three women focus their attention on you while you take in your surroundings. All three of the apparent succubi are sitting around an unlit fire pit in a few cozy looking chairs. The one named Heather was right, the view really is quite nice.
Suddenly, the red-haired woman darts forward and latches onto your arm, forcing her sizable cleavage to press into you as her ruby red eyes stare into yours.
Hey there handsome! My name's Jennifer, do you come around here often?♥
You flush as she continues to press her ample breasts against your arm and waits for you to introduce yourself.
Jen, I'm pretty sure he's the food delivery guy.
One of Jennifer's hands starts to grope your groin over your clothes.
But where are my manners? The petite gal with blue hair is Catherine, or Cathy for short, and miss huge tits over there is Heather.
Heather cheerfully waves at you while reclining in her comfortable looking chair while Catherine puts down her book to scowl at Jennifer.
Jen, you needy slut, I mean he is {i}literally{/i} the delivery guy. He has the food we ordered.
Jennifer breaks her hold of your arm to contest Catherine's statement.
I am {i}not{/i} needy, I'm just hungry! And I'll have you know that-
You confirm that you are the delivery guy while moving forward to set the bag of supplies down by the fire pit, trying your best to ignore the ache in your loins from Jennifer's attention.
Well at least you admit you're a slut...
Yeah, we're succubi. Soooo, what's your point?
W-Well I wasn't born as one! Y-You! GAH!

Catherine lets out a frustrated sigh as she starts fishing around the insides of the supply bag you left while Heather continues to relax in her chair, letting out a luxurious sigh as she roasts some marshmallows on a moonlit fire.

Catherine lets out a frustrated sigh as she starts fishing around the insides of the supply bag you left while Heather continues to relax in her chair, letting out a luxurious sigh as she bathes in the sun's rays.
See? I told you two it would all work out in the end.
Jennifer turns back to you with a seductive smile.
You never managed to introduce yourself, handsome stranger. What's your name?
Oh, I'm [ThePlayerName], and I should probably get going.
Whaaat? You don't want to stick around and get... Properly rewarded for saving us?♥
E-Eh?! Oh come on, you can't be mad abou-

Catherine pulls open the bag to show you and the other two women its contents, and you feel a red hot streak of annoyance blow through you upon seeing what's inside. There's no food, no supplies, nothing that would be considered remotely useful inside of it, there's just rocks of all different shapes and sizes. No wonder Vivian wouldn't let you look inside of it when she gave it to you.
She displays it to the rest of you, seemingly flustered about it.
'Sorry, we're out of essence potions, I do apologize and hope this strapping hero will tide you over until our supplies are restocked and delivered. - Vivian♥'
'P.S. - [ThePlayerName], if you try to leave them there, they will probably die from starvation, so do your best!♥'
As you look up from the note with a feeling of resigned acceptance, you can see Jennifer and Heather giving you rather lewd looks while Catherine blushes deeply and mutters darkly under her breath.
Well [ThePlayerName], guess you're sticking around then, hmmmm?♥
You can feel a bead of nervous sweat run down your back, knowing you have no way to get out of this. But at the same time, you can't help but get a little excited for what's about to happen.
Soooo who should get him first?
Ugh... You two go at it, I think I can last 'till those other supplies get here...
Well, I'll go first then!♥ Come on! We're going to do this in the cabin, it's wayyy more comfortable in there.

You let yourself be dragged into the cozy cabin by an excited Jennifer, unable to protest knowing the consequences of refusing. Heather lets out a languid sigh as she stretches and gets up before walking in after Jen, followed a few seconds later by a sheepish looking Cathy.

Jen lays you down on one of the three comfortable beds in the cabin, happily stripping your clothes off before laying down next to you, staring eagerly at your hardening manhood. Heather sits down in a large cushioned chair and watches you intently as you lay on the bed, and Catherine sits in the corner farthest from you and plants her face deep into her book, trying her hardest to not look at you.
As you continue your trek along the mountain, you finally see a wooden cabin nestled on a rocky plateau a short distance away. You hope the succubi are still doing okay since your last visit.
Thankfully you didn't have to carry a bag of rocks this time, but you went knowing full well you would have to feed them yourself.
As you get closer to the cabin, you hear some familiar female voices chatting outside it.
I'm sure [ThePlayerName] will be back soon.
Y-Yeah... I'm starting to feel really hungry too...
See! Even {i}Cathy{/i} is getting hungry for cum!
As you round the corner of the cabin, the three women immediately stop their conversation and look at you with a combination of lust and hunger glinting in their eyes.
They're sitting around an unlit fire pit in a few rather cozy looking chairs.
Jennifer wastes no time and immediately jumps out of her chair, hooking her arm around yours and starting to drag you into the cabin.
DIBS! What took you so long, [ThePlayerName]? You'd better be ready to feed all of us, because we're all {i}starving{/i}!♥
Wha-?! You can't just call dibs in a life or death situation!
Yes I can! I eat more than you and Heather combined! You can get by with just a potion a day while I need like ten to just survive!
Heather softly laughs as she gets out of her chair and starts to follow her impatient companion into the cabin.
Cathy, you know Jen can get really thirsty.
You and the three hungry succubi quickly filter into the cabin.

Jennifer lays you down on one of the three comfortable beds in the cabin, happily stripping your clothes off before laying down next to you, staring eagerly at your hardening manhood. Heather sits down in a large cushioned chair and watches you intently as you lay on the bed, and Catherine sits in the corner farthest from you and plants her face deep into her book, trying her hardest to not look at you.
Jennifer gets off the bed and plops down onto a chair.
Yup! I can't wait to go at him again.♥ His cum's great!♥
As Heather cuddles up next to you on the bed, you notice Catherine peeking at you from over the cover of her book with a deep flush on her face. She must have been watching you this whole time...
Are you sure? I think he's done already...
Jennifer looks over at your now collapsed and exhausted form.
W-What?! H-Hey, don't disappear on us already!
Oh dear... Well, I'm sure he'll hurry back with more for us to eat.
He'd better hurry back, or we're going to starve up here!
Your vision fades to black, and you realize that you're probably going to need more spirit to complete this quest...
Eh?! F-Fine but... uh... he's not looking too good.
Heather looks over at your collapsed form.
Oh my... Maybe I overdid it...
W-Well, I'm sure I'll be okay without any food...
I won't! I still need another go at him!
Hmmmm... Well, I'm sure he'll hurry back with more for us to eat.
He better hurry back or we're going to starve! Especially Cathy!
Your vision fades to black, and you realize that you're probably going to need more spirit to complete this quest...
Heather bounces off the bed with an extra spring in her step before faceplanting onto one of the other beds and snuggling with a pillow.
Upon her friend's words, Catherine jerks out of her lusty stupor, absentmindedly dropping her book while she struggles to tear her gaze away from your rigid manhood.
Catherine shyly approaches the bed with a bright red face and sits down next to you, awkwardly fidgeting as she tries not to stare at your naked form.
Are you sure you're okay with this?
Ah?! Uhm, y-yeah... I have to eat too, and... Y-You know...
She bashfully plays with her blue hair as she musters up the courage to finally look you in the eyes.
I-It's just all kind of weird because I used to be a normal human girl... A-An adventurer actually.
Y-You might have even heard about me, actually. Uhm, I tried to bypass the grimoire and quest systems to try to find some high level gear early, but... uhm...
She teleported right in front of me and a bunch of other succubi at the capital!♪ She was soooo under-leveled we just couldn't help but... 'tease' her a little.♥
But whatever she did to teleport her there managed to break both her recall stone and her grimoire, and... well...
Ah... Uhm... I-It didn't take long for all that demonic energy and um... O-Orgasms... To turn me {i}into{/i} a succubus...
B-But to be honest, it hasn't been so bad. All the monster girls I've met have been pretty nice overall, and-
Catherine freezes, her face starting to turn crimson again as she remembers what's going on.
But she takes a deep breath to calm herself down as her green eyes steel with slightly lusty resolve.
Alright... [ThePlayerName], I'm not going to do the kind of stuff they did, I'm just going to take a little bit of energy from you, so don't expect to cum...
With a surprising burst of speed, Catherine leaps forward and traps you in a deep kiss, firmly closing her eyes while she lays on top of your chest.
The kiss starts gentle, your tongues slowly playing with each other.
She gulps audibly, sending a shiver of pleasure through you as you feel her drink down a mouthful of your energy.

Her kiss gets deeper and more assertive, and with another powerful energy-draining gulp sending a wave of ecstasy through you, you shudder with increasing delightful weakness as she continues to drain your energy bit by bit.
Every mouthful of energy she takes from you seems to spur her on, causing her to push herself further against you as she starts to grind one of her stocking clad legs against your groin.
The intense energy drain is making your mind spin, and you feel your cock start to leak precum onto Catherine's supple thigh.
I knew Cathy would get into it once she got started!♪
Mmmhmmm...♪ It's good to finally see her have a little bit of fun with this.
With a definitive and ecstasy inducing gulp, you moan into Catherine's mouth and blow a thick load onto her leg.
A slightly chilly blue glow covers the two of you as your cum and energy gets absorbed into her.
But Catherine doesn't seem content with stopping there, and continues to deeply kiss you while delightfully grinding her leg against your aching manhood.
Hey Cathy, don't forget to save some for us, huh?
Oh, let her have another round, Jen. I'm pretty sure she needs this.
You're lost in a blissful haze from the combination of Catherine's energy draining lips and her leg teasing your shaft.
Catherine opens her eyes and stares into yours, and what should be a sweet, even romantic moment, instead sends a chill of fear running up your spine.
The whites of her eyes have turned pitch black, and she's glaring down at you with a cold, almost predatory gaze as she continues to effortlessly dominate your mouth.
Your arms stay limp and helpless at your sides, and you're far too drained of energy to try and push her away...
So we're going to roast marshmallows tonight right?
Yup! At least I remembered to bring snacks. Shame they can't actually keep us alive.
Jennifer and Heather don't seem to notice your growing plight as you feel yourself getting weaker and weaker from Catherine's insatiable mouth, or maybe they just don't care...
With a whimper, you shudder as Catherine starts to drain your energy faster, sending waves of ecstasy through you with every gulp she makes.

It doesn't take long for your throbbing cock to be pushed over the edge once more, spurting out a few thick ropes of cum onto Catherine's leg, which promptly gets absorbed in what feels to be a bone chillingly cold blue glow.
Out of the corner of your eye, you can see her tail deftly moving in closer to your still orgasming shaft, wetly showing off its churning insides as it inches closer and closer to your tip.
Her tail's unnatural opening engulfs your manhood in a single motion, forcing you to weakly moan into her mouth as it starts to intensely suck on your shaft in time with her energy draining gulps.
The combined stimulation of her tail and mouth draining you is far too much for your weakened body to handle, and every gulp she makes sends waves of hellish pleasure cascading through you.
Every bit of energy she drinks down is now accompanied by your oversensitive manhood ejaculating a thick load of cum into her ravenous tail.
Uh... Cathy? I think you've had enough.
Your eyes start to roll up as you feel more and more of your life pleasurably pour into Catherine.
The endless waves of pleasure are eroding away your mind, leaving you wanting more and more until you can hardly even imagine wanting this to ever stop.
Your cock keeps cumming into Catherine's tail like a broken faucet while she continues to kiss you into oblivion.
Jennifer grabs Catherine and pulls her off of you, forcing a shocked gasp out of her as her eyes return to normal and she snaps out of her trance-like feeding frenzy.
You're left laying on the bed in a pleasure induced delirium as your brain struggles to even remind you to breathe and darkness quickly overtakes your vision.
Eventually, even trying to think becomes too much for you to handle, and the world slowly starts to ebb away as everything goes dark...
Groggily, you wake up in a delightfully soft bed and stare up at a wooden ceiling while your head painfully throbs, trying to piece together what happened before you passed out.

As you look over to the source of the voice, you can see Jennifer and Heather looking down on you, concern plastered on their faces before Catherine jumps onto the bed, engulfing you in a tight hug as tears stream down her face.
You wrap your tired arms around the crying demon girl to comfort her, and your weary mind notices that someone put your clothes back on while you were unconscious.
Ah... Well... Human women that turn into succubi have a lot harder time controlling their instincts... So...
Catherine was trying to eat your soul.
Cathy lets out a quiet sob of apology.

Y-Yeah, uhm... That. We're really supposed to keep watch over her to make sure she doesn't do that, but... uh... We figured that your recall stone would step in if things got that bad, so we were a bit more lax than normal... S-Sorry...
Her tail moved your stuff away from the bed and we didn't notice, so... It didn't do its thing.
That, or you were enjoying yourself too much for it to activate.♪
Thankfully, shortly after you lost consciousness, our delivery of supplies got here so we could give you some energy potions to help you recover.
I'm amazed those harpies could carry that big crate...
You look over and see a large wooden crate with several labeled potions inside sitting in the middle of the floor.
I-I didn't mean to do it... I'm sorry [ThePlayerName]...
It's okay Catherine, I forgive you.
You gently pat her head and she looks up with teary eyes.
R-Really? B-But I almost killed you!
You wipe Catherine's tear away with the blanket.
Well, you said you're sorry, and you obviously didn't mean to do that. Besides, you were an adventurer once too, and you should know better than anyone that danger is part of the job, right?
Catherine weakly smiles at your attempt at humor before hugging you again, a little tighter this time.
Awww... That's so sweet, I think I'm going to vomit...
Oh, don't be like that Jen. You're just mad you're going to have to drink essence potions.
Catherine gives you one final squeeze before breaking the hug and giving you some space, and despite the potions they gave you while you were unconscious, you still feel pretty exhausted...
Ahhh...♪ So it {i}was{/i} because he was enjoying himself too much.♪
Hahaha, and here Cathy was, all worried you would hate her for almost eating your soul!
Catherine seems to be shaking a little, you aren't exactly sure wh- Oh, now she's shaking you, it was anger. She's definitely angry.
Ah, Cathy, he still needs to recover...
Catherine abruptly stops throttling you and releases you with a huff before storming off to a corner and shoving her face back into a book.
Ahhh... Well I don't think she's really {i}that{/i} mad at you...
Yeah, Cathy's not mad. I've seen her mad, and believe me when I say it's not something you want to see. She's probably just embarrassed about you saying you loved what she did to you.♪
You gasp and gently rub your sore neck while you recover from Catherine's second, much less pleasurable assault on your body.
But uhm, I don't know if you know much about monster girl society, but uhm, soul eating is actually incredibly illegal.
Mmmhmm, lots of laws and regulations about it. Oh, and murder is illegal also.
I uh, think he would know that Heather, considering murder is illegal for humans too. Not to mention the fact that if you eat someone's soul, it kills them, which is illegal.
Catherine quietly chimes in from the back.

Soul eating doesn't always kill the partner, some succubi have been known to only eat part of their partner's soul, effectively putting them into an eternal dream world that they can control, letting them play with them any time they want.
Oh yeah, I remember hearing about that from a friend! Only the really old and really powerful succubi can pull that off though, and from what I hear the paperwork required for that is insane.
Sounds kind of romantic to be with your partner like that forever.♪
[ThePlayerName] would have just died in this case... A-And I w-would have...
...Yeah, you probably would have been well on your way to becoming a {i}true{/i} succubus...
Catherine shudders, clearly disturbed at the prospect of becoming a 'true succubus', and goes back to reading her book to try to distract herself.
A 'true succubus'? But aren't all of you succubi?

Yes, but none of us are true succubi. A true succubus is different, they're the kind of monsters you probably read about in human legends. I don't think there are many around anymore, thank goodness...

Yeah, true succubi are succubi that get addicted to eating human souls from the pleasure and power it brings them, slowly eroding their morals until they become uncaring, loveless monsters that kill every human they come across, and sometimes even other monsters if they can't find any humans...

Theoretically, it should be possible to come back from being a true succubus, but... Most of them don't want to by that point, and just keep eating more and more souls, leaving countless dead behind them.

True succubi used to be a lot more prominent ages ago, when there were a lot less succubi. But as time went on and the number of succubi and other soul eating monster girls increased, they needed to adapt, and fast.
Or humanity would probably go extinct in a few days.♪
D-Did you have to say that so cheerfully Heather?
I'm just trying to keep the mood upbeat!♪

...Basically, there's rules for a reason, and breaking them is bad no matter what species you belong to. I... uh... I just wanted to give you some context to all the stuff that just happened is all...
Y-Yeah... Well, [ThePlayerName] should probably get back to town and get his reward for delivering us food...
But first, we want you to have this as a token of our appreciation!
Heather hands you the bag you carried here, and you're happy to find that it's no longer full of rocks!
We had a bunch of extra potions, and I put in a special something extra in there just for you.♥
Ah, thanks! But how am I supposed to get back to town? My legs feel like jelly...
Well, you could stay the night.♥
{i}No{/i}, you'll just want to fuck him all night! And he needs a break!
There's one of the harpies who brought us the delivery outside, she'll fly you back to town.
But uh, we'll probably be here a while, so once you're better, feel free to come to visit! I'll make it worth your while.♥
Jen really doesn't like to drink those potions. She'd much rather drink as much semen as she can.
I-It almost seems like you're trying to make that sound like a bad thing...
Catherine decides to get up and help you leave before Jen tries to seduce you into staying the night.
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3
She gives you one last quiet apology and a farewell before the harpy picks you up in her talons and begins to fly you back to town.
At first, everything seems fine as the harpy soars through the air.
But it doesn't take long for you to notice the rather petite bird woman's labored breaths as she struggles to carry your weight back towards the town.

You wouldn't consider yourself particularly heavy, but compared to what she normally flies with, you must weigh a ton. You can't help but nervously look down at the forest below as it seems to draw closer and closer towards your dangling legs.
Y-Yeah! I'm fine! Great even! Never failed a delivery! E-Even if I'm underwinged for the c-cargo!
H-How many harpies were there to carry the crate to the camp?
Just then, you're both struck with a great gust of wind that sends you and the harpy hurtling towards the town at speeds no harpy should ever be able to reach.
Both of you scream the whole way down, but the small part of your mind not accepting your impending death dryly notes that you're making great time.

The two of you crash land in front of Vivian's inn in a tangled heap of feathers and limbs, bruised and battered, but still very much alive. A few bystanders crowd around the pair of you, asking if both of you are okay.
Vivian bursts out of the front door of the inn, obviously trying to figure out what just happened.
What in the sweet merciful {i}hell{/i} was that noise?!
Vivian sighs deeply and helps disentangle you from the harpy before brushing herself off and handing the harpy a hefty looking pouch filled with eros.
The harpy eagerly grabs the pouch with her mouth and clumsily flits into the inn, clearly still a little shaken from her not-so-gentle landing.
Vivian helps you up before handing you your own payment for your delivery, and you can't help but notice that there's significantly more eros there than what was initially promised.
I heard you had some... {i}issues{/i} with the delivery, so I figured some hazard pay was in order.♥
And a bit extra for the... {i}Crash{/i}. Hopefully your time with those lovely ladies in the mountain made up for all the effort, hm?
D-Did you really have to make me carry a bag of rocks up the whole damn mountain?
Vivian looks off in thought for a moment.
Hm, I guess not cutie, but I figured you might not want to trek all the way up the mountain to feed a trio of succubi with sex...
Hm, actually, saying it out loud like that does make it sound a little silly... I think I may have made this a little over contrived...
Well, {i}hero{/i}, just look on the bright side, you made some new friends!♥ {i}And{/i} got some great exercise.
Well, I hope you're all a little {i}more{/i} than just friends by now.♥

You stagger off to a room in the inn, too exhausted to try and talk with Vivian about the matter properly as she giggles playfully. The moment your head hits the pillow of the soft bed, you immediately fall into a deep, dreamless sleep...
Then you wake up the next day, feeling refreshed and ready to continue your adventure, and idly wonder when you should visit the succubus trio next...
